title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HELP FOR WHEN IT'S COLD WEBSITE DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about where to donate winter gear. Items needed vary by shelter. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Disaster Donations Coordination Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - COLD WEATHER INFORMATION DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
